bio.name: Your Name
bio.intro: Mechatronics Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in robotics systems, computer vision, machine learning, and full-stack development. I design, build, and program systems from mechanical prototypes through deployed software.

projects.title: Hand Gesture–Controlled Stewart Platform
projects.summary: 6-DOF Stewart platform with real-time hand gesture recognition at 98% accuracy, delivered within 50% of budget.
projects.description: Led the full design and development of a 6-DOF Stewart platform as a capstone project. Implemented real-time hand gesture recognition using Python and MediaPipe, achieving 98% accuracy across 6 gestures mapped to 6 degrees of freedom. Designed and iterated CAD models in OnShape to improve range of motion across all translational and rotational axes. Over 100 participants operated the prototype at the final exhibition.

projects.title: Mobile Robotics — ROS / LiDAR
projects.summary: ROS-based TurtleBot for autonomous path planning, trajectory following, colour recognition, and object detection.
projects.description: Co-developed a ROS-based TurtleBot on Linux implementing path planning, trajectory following, colour recognition, and object detection. Completed all milestone demonstrations in under 3 minutes, ranking in the top 10% of the class. Scripted LiDAR-based path planning simulations for a skid-steer vehicle, validating navigation algorithms across multiple scenarios.

projects.title: PEIE STEM Camp Portal
projects.summary: Full-stack camp management portal with key-gated student sections, admin panel, and Google Sheets attendance.
projects.description: Built a GitHub Pages-hosted portal for a STEM robotics camp serving students ages 6–12. Features include key-gated student sections, an admin panel, GitHub Contents API persistence, and a Google Sheets/Forms-based attendance system with an Apps Script trigger.

projects.title: Work Flow Assist PWA
projects.summary: Personal productivity PWA with Eisenhower-style priority engine, guided task estimator, and daily planner.
projects.description: Built a client-side personal productivity tracker. Features an Eisenhower-style priority engine, guided task estimator, and a Daily Assistant planner with Focus and Spread modes.
